items.briefing:
With winter underway, Norton is warning of a seasonal spike in scam activity across the region, and a newly identified Android app called DCloud has been linked to a massive network of fraudulent websites designed to steal personal and financial information. Staff should be cautious about clicking unfamiliar links or downloading apps from outside official stores. Separately, a new piece of malware called "Djinn" is actively targeting cloud and AI service credentials, which is relevant as more Australian organisations adopt these tools.

**Practical tip:** If you receive an unexpected message with a link — even from a known contact — go directly to the official website instead of clicking through.

featured.title: Australian firms boost AI spend despite weak returns
featured.quote: Australian firms spending heavily on AI but failing to measure actual business impact or returns.
